summary: PR-UM5 Usage Warning Levels + CTA Integration Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (18/18). All frontend tests passed. Verified: (1) Quota warning thresholds: 70% warning, 85% critical, 100% limit_reached, (2) GET /api/tenant/usage-summary returns warning_level, warning_message, upgrade_recommended, cta_href=/pricing per metric, (3) trial_conversion payload present with recommended_plan based on usage ratio, (4) GET /api/tenant/quota-status exposes warning fields, (5) Dashboard shows warning microcopy + CTA for critical metrics, (6) Trial recommendation block shows Enterprise plan for 85% usage, (7) Usage page shows warning CTA + trial recommendation, (8) Admin tenant usage overview shows NO CTA buttons (verified), (9) CTA href correctly set to /pricing.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: test_warning_level_normal_under_70 - <70% usage returns 'normal'
✅ Backend: test_warning_level_warning_at_70 - 70-84% returns 'warning'
✅ Backend: test_warning_level_critical_at_85 - 85-99% returns 'critical'
✅ Backend: test_warning_level_limit_reached_at_100 - 100%+ returns 'limit_reached'
✅ Backend: test_warning_level_with_none_limit - None/0 limit returns 'normal'
✅ Backend: test_recommend_starter_under_40 - <40% usage recommends Starter
✅ Backend: test_recommend_pro_40_to_80 - 40-80% recommends Pro
✅ Backend: test_recommend_enterprise_over_80 - >80% recommends Enterprise
✅ Backend: test_usage_summary_returns_200 - Endpoint returns 200
✅ Backend: test_usage_summary_has_warning_fields_per_metric - Each metric has warning_level, warning_message, upgrade_recommended
✅ Backend: test_usage_summary_cta_fields_when_upgrade_recommended - cta_href=/pricing when upgrade_recommended=true
✅ Backend: test_usage_summary_has_trial_conversion_payload - trial_conversion payload present
✅ Backend: test_quota_status_returns_200 - Endpoint returns 200
✅ Backend: test_quota_status_has_quotas_array - quotas array with warning fields
✅ Backend: test_quota_status_cta_fields - cta_href and cta_label present
✅ Backend: test_admin_usage_endpoint_exists - Admin usage endpoint works
✅ Backend: test_trial_tenant_has_critical_warning - 85/100 export shows 'critical'
✅ Backend: test_trial_conversion_recommendation - Enterprise recommended for 85% usage
✅ Frontend: Dashboard trial banner present with 'Planı yükselt' CTA
✅ Frontend: Dashboard usage card with 3 metrics (Reservations, Reports, Exports)
✅ Frontend: Exports metric shows 85/100 with 'Kritik' badge
✅ Frontend: 'Planları Gör' CTA button present on critical metric
✅ Frontend: Trial conversion block shows Enterprise recommendation
✅ Frontend: Usage page heading 'Kullanım görünürlüğü'
✅ Frontend: Usage page metric CTA present
✅ Frontend: Usage page trial recommendation present
✅ Frontend: 3 warning level badges on usage page
✅ Frontend: Trend chart present on usage page
✅ Frontend: Admin tenant usage overview present
✅ Frontend: Admin usage shows metrics + trend chart
✅ Frontend: Admin usage has ZERO CTA buttons (verified)
critical_code_review_comments: quota_warning_service.py: Thresholds correctly implement 70% warning, 85% critical, 100% limit_reached
quota_warning_service.py: recommend_plan() correctly returns Starter (<40%), Pro (40-80%), Enterprise (>80%)
usage_read_service.py: build_metric_warning_payload() and build_trial_conversion_payload() correctly integrated
tenant_features.py: /api/tenant/quota-status exposes warning_level, warning_message, upgrade_recommended, cta_href, cta_label
DashboardUsageSummaryCard.jsx: Shows CTA via UsageQuotaCard showCta prop
UsagePage.jsx: Shows CTA via UsageMetricTiles showCta prop + UsageTrialRecommendation
AdminTenantUsageOverview.jsx: Explicitly sets showCta={false} - NO pricing CTA in admin views
AppShell.jsx: quotaAlerts only shown when user is NOT admin (!isAdmin)
seed_data_creation: Preview data prepared: demo trial tenant e4b61b67-66fb-5898-b2ff-1329fd2627ed has export.generated=85/100 in usage_daily
context_for_next_testing_agent: PR-UM5 usage warning + CTA features fully working. Trial demo tenant shows: (1) Trial banner with 13 days remaining + 'Planı yükselt' CTA, (2) Dashboard usage card with Exports 85/100 showing 'Kritik' badge + warning message + 'Planları Gör' CTA, (3) Trial conversion block recommending Enterprise plan, (4) Usage page with same warnings + CTA + trial recommendation + trend chart. Admin tenant usage view shows usage data but NO CTA buttons (verified). All quota warning thresholds working: normal (<70%), warning (70-84%), critical (85-99%), limit_reached (100%+). CTA href is /pricing throughout.
